# CredentialSession.ErrorCode.invalidInput

**Case**

One or more parameters is invalid.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalidInput
```

## Miscellaneous error codes

- **CredentialSession.ErrorCode.internalError**: The framework encountered an internal error.
